text:
EXPLANATION: This is a well-known historical treatise by the Marquis de Condorcet, published in 1785, which is a foundational text in the mathematical study of voting and probability. The title and author are historically accurate and well-documented in library catalogues and digital archives.
LINK: https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k86266z
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l'application de l'analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat, Marquis de Condorcet
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
